title: Fancy Display TxT
description: Displays the currently used Minecraft texture on screen in real time.
body:
Fancy Texture Display is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that displays the currently used Minecraft texture directly on your screen in real time, without the need to open resource pack menus or debug screens.

This mod is especially useful for:

Texture pack creators who want to quickly identify which textures are being used

Content creators recording videos or tutorials

Showcase videos and previews of resource packs

Developers testing and debugging textures visually

✨ Features

Displays the active texture directly in-game

No need to open resource pack menus

Clean and non-intrusive on-screen display

Works seamlessly while playing

Lightweight and performance-friendly

Fully client-side (no server required)

🧵 Use Cases

Quickly verify textures while editing resource packs

Record videos showing texture changes in real time

Improve workflow efficiency for texture development

Ideal for creators and modders

⚙️ Compatibility

Mod Loader: Fabric

Minecraft Version: 1.20+

Client-side only

This mod is designed to integrate smoothly into normal gameplay while providing valuable visual feedback for texture-related work.
